testcase.name: Successfully register a new user
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the signup page............................................passed When User fills the registration form with details from signup properties...passed And User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account........................passed Then User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard....passed

testcase.name: Successfully request a password reset link
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the forgot password page...................................passed When User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link..passed Then User should see a confirmation for the reset link......................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.name: Create adds a new candidate
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User adds a new candidate..............................................passed Then New candidate should be created successfully...........................passed

testcase.name: Create a Task
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed When user create a task for can.............................................passed

testcase.name: Add a new note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed And user adds a note for can................................................passed

testcase.name: Edit the existing note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed And user edits the note for can.............................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed And user deletes the note for can...........................................passed

testcase.name: Upload a new document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed And user uploads a document for can.........................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the uploaded document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to candidateInDetailView................................passed When user navigates to engagement...........................................passed And user deletes the document for can.......................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to candidate and edit two fields
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to first candidate......................................passed And user clicks edit button on candidate....................................passed And user edits two fields of candidate......................................passed And user scrolls and saves candidate changes................................passed

testcase.name: Submit a candidate to a job from the three-dot menu
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to submit candidate from job three dots.................passed And user selects a candidate and clicks next................................passed And user fills the candidate submission form................................passed Then user completes the final submission....................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to submission page
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to submissionPage.......................................passed

testcase.name: Create a Task

testcase.name: User delete the note

testcase.name: Upload documents

testcase.name: Delete document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user deletes the document...............................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to job and edit two fields
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to first job............................................passed And user clicks edit button on job..........................................passed And user edits two fields of job............................................passed And user scrolls and saves job changes......................................passed
